dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires context-dependent direction (long/short based on trend). Entry conditions use close vs sma_20 (20-period MA) and adx_14 > 25 for trend confirmation. Exit uses close crossing below MA and ADX < 20 for trend exhaustion. Stop loss derived from 2.0x ATR parameter converted to percentage equivalent (2.0% of account risk). Position sizing and max concurrent trades are backtest engine parameters, not rule conditions.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires context-dependent direction (long/short based on trend). Entry conditions use close vs sma_20 (20-period MA) and adx_14 > 25 for trend confirmation. Exit uses close crossing below MA and ADX < 20 for trend exhaustion. Stop loss derived from 2.0x ATR parameter converted to percentage equivalent (2.0% of account risk). Position sizing and max concurrent trades are backtest engine parameters, not rule conditions.

source_rule_text: A trader should adopt a big-picture perspective on market direction, trade with the trend across multiple instruments while maintaining strict risk control, because this approach has structural validity regardless of market conditions.
